today.mood: High humidity morning, but the city is buzzing with major events
today.summary: Saturday morning with overcast skies and 94% humidity. KLIMS wrapped up last week, but today brings Hujan's massive 20th anniversary concert at Bukit Jalil tonight and the Malaysia International Jewellery Fair kicks off at KLCC. The weather is muggy but manageable—perfect for air-conditioned mall visits or late-afternoon outings before the evening concert rush.

weather.advisory: Very high humidity—stay hydrated and seek air-con during midday heat

news.title: High humidity persists, rain expected later today
news.plain_english: 94% humidity this morning, broken clouds now. Afternoon thunderstorms likely 3-6 PM—plan indoor activities mid-afternoon or wait until evening.

news.title: LRT Kelana Jaya Line history of disruptions
news.plain_english: No current disruptions reported today, but the Kelana Jaya Line has had recurring issues in 2026. Allow extra travel time during peak hours 5:30-7:30 PM, especially if heading to Bukit Jalil for tonight's concert.

transit.verdict: Running normally today, but allow buffer time
